title: Man's Emerald Expansion
description: Give emerald a second life, and make it even more useful
body:
_Man's Emerald Expansion_

Emerald Expansion is a small mod designed to give emeralds a second life. In Minecraft, emeralds have very little use, but with this mod, you'll be able to add content to them, like armor, tools and more.

 A lot of content will be arriving soon !!
 

 _Next Feature coming soon:_
 

 - Emerald Tools [✅]
 - Emerald Armor [✅​]
 - Emerald Totem [Coming soon]
 - Emerald Statue [Coming soon]
 - Emerald Food [Coming soon]
 - Fun tools [Coming soon]
